title: crataegus monogyna f. flexuosa
intro: Crataegus monogyna f. flexuosa, also known as the flexible hawthorn, is a variety of the hawthorn tree that is characterized by its slender branches and smaller leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardio-protective properties. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna f. flexuosa include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of heart disease. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
